title: Smooth Low Fire
description: Lower fire for better visibility -- ideal for PvP and vanilla-friendly.
body:
## SMOOTH LOW FIRE 32x

> Smooth Low Fire 32x is a resource pack that makes your View of the game Less obstructive when caught on fire! BUT you may still see the effect of Burning! This has always been an issue for the majority base of minecraft members. So a pack has been made for it in order to fix this!

![fpp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e21e960575db4e2c50e44fbcafa549083e8e490.gif)

Heavily inspired by [Better low fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-low-fire)

Other texture packs used in these pictures: 
[Saturated MC](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/saturated-mc) , [Skyblue Nether Portal](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/skyblue-nether-portal)


> please support me on paypal
